scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter app build
scripts.build:deps: rm -f packages/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && pnpm --filter @sden99/cdisc-types build && pnpm --filter @sden99/data-processing build && pnpm -r --filter '!app' --filter '!@sden99/cdisc-types' --filter '!@sden99/data-processing' build
